message:
🐛 Fix OPA card not detecting Gatekeeper on platform-eval and vllm-d (#1462)

Two root causes prevented the OPA card from detecting Gatekeeper:

1. **Stale cache poisoning**: The localStorage cache persisted "Connection
   failed" errors as definitive "not installed" status. On subsequent page
   loads, the cached errors prevented fresh kubectl checks from running.
   Fix: exclude entries with errors from the cache, and re-check clusters
   with cached errors on initial load.

2. **Serial WebSocket kubectl handling**: The kc-agent processed kubectl
   messages serially in the WebSocket read loop. One slow cluster (e.g.,
   pok-prod-sa at ~16s timeout) blocked all subsequent kubectl commands
   on the same connection, causing the 8s client-side timeouts.
   Fix: handle kubectl messages concurrently with goroutines, using a
   write mutex for thread-safe WebSocket writes.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
